arts.ttl: Leeds United have £5m transfer decision to make ASAP amid major EFL manager news
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has lost his job in the Championship with Plymouth Argyle parting ways this week, but it leaves Leeds United loanee Darko Gyabi in a peculiar situation. It’s the second time in almost a year Rooney has left a job in the Championship amid relegation fears after being sacked from Birmingham City following defeat against Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leeds United keen on 21-y/o playmaker with 17G/A this year, costs less than Ampadu
arts.sum: According to a report from Voetbal Nieuws has claimed that Leeds are keeping tabs on MLS attacking midfielder Diego Luna, currently at Real Salt Lake. Leeds United are said to be interested in signing Real Salt Lake talent Diego Luna during the January window.

arts.ttl: Major Emi Buendia, Leeds United update given with January window imminent
arts.sum: With that game tomorrow also comes the opening of the January window too, which presents Leeds with the opportunity to pursue a possible attacking midfield signing. Leeds United tried to sign Emi Buendia during the summer window, but he stayed put at Aston Villa and his now being speculated about a January exit from Villa Park.

arts.ttl: ‘There is interest’ – Leeds United in picture for player, Whites told €8m needed for signing
arts.sum: Real Salt Lake’s Diego Luna has emerged as a transfer target for Leeds United, according to a report from Belgium. The winger has impressed for the MLS side this year, scoring nine goals and registering eight assists from 36 games in all competitions. His performances would have caught the attention of Leeds United and Anderlecht. arts.ttl: Burnley manager Scott Parker blasts busy schedule as they fall behind Leeds United
arts.sum: Burnley head coach Scott Parker has blasted the 'tough schedule' after his side drew 0-0 away at Middlesbrough on Sunday night. "The fixtures have probably not been the best of friends since they came out at the start of the season - Sheffield United away on Boxing Day was a tough game and tonight as well.

arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle make Wayne Rooney statement as Leeds United Championship rivals take big step
arts.sum: Thanks also to all the staff who made me feel welcome and who make the club such a special place, the players and fans for their efforts and support during my time as Head Coach and I wish them all the best for the future. Plymouth are due to face Bristol City at home on New Year's Day, but will now do so without former Manchester United and England star Rooney after his departure.
